name: hivemq
explanation: HiveMQ is monitored via JMXFetch: the spec inherits `template: instances/jmx` and `init_config/jmx`, so collection happens over JMX/RMI on the broker's monitoring port (default 9010). Although user/password are marked optional in the spec, any production HiveMQ deployment with JMX exposed off-localhost will require JMX authentication credentials, and TLS-protected RMI additionally requires trust/key stores. Per pattern I (JMXFetch) and pattern D (spec credentials), this falls into the categorical `impossible` bucket for auto-config because the credentials and keystores are operator-provisioned out-of-band.
notes: Despite HiveMQ also offering a Prometheus extension, this Datadog integration is JMX-only; no openmetrics_endpoint path exists in the spec.
